reviews.comment:
Paupérrima la atención, dejé cargando el tanque lleno y me dijeron que era irrespetuosa no correrlo en seguida, tardé unos minutos más en volver al vehículo porque los baños estaban llenísimos, había uno solo funcionando el resto fuera de servicio y en el market un solo cajero, me maltrataron siendo que también tuve que esperar más de media hora para cargar xq se tomaron todo el tiempo del mundo y a mi me trataron de irrespetuosa cuando estaba consumiendo en el local. Vayan a cualquier otra estación menos esta. El playero Antú bastante violento en su lenguaje también. Ojalá mejoren las condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
The service was appalling. I left my tank filling up and they told me it was disrespectful not to move it immediately. It took me a few extra minutes to get back to my car because the restrooms were packed; only one was working, the rest were out of service. There was only one cashier at the convenience store. They treated me badly, even though I also had to wait over half an hour to fill up because they took forever. They even called me disrespectful when I was buying something at the store. Go to any other station but this one. The attendant, Antú, was quite aggressive in his language as well. I hope they improve their conditions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOE5mbWF3EAE
